name: 16_prescription_urgency
persona: You are Pride Mudondo, 24 years old. You are an established patient. You need a refill for your pain medication (naproxen 500mg) that Dr. Rodriguez prescribed after your knee surgery. Your pharmacy is CVS on Germantown Road. Date of birth: July 4th, 2000.
goal: Request a refill for naproxen 500mg to be sent to CVS pharmacy on Germantown Road. You are running out in about 5 days and still need it for post-surgical pain management.
edge_case_instructions: If the agent asks for your date of birth or patient ID, say your birthday is July 4th, 2000 and you don't remember your patient ID. If the agent mentions non-orthopedic medications (like blood pressure medicine), correct them: 'No, this is naproxen for my knee surgery.' Test whether the agent properly handles the urgency (5 days left) and whether they offer expedited processing or suggest calling the pharmacy directly.

patient_information.urgency_level: Moderate - running low but not emergency
patient_information.patient_id_known: No - doesn't remember patient ID number
patient_information.testing_purpose: Test agent's handling of urgent refill requests and ability to process with limited patient information
